actions.text:
🚫 *Access Denied*

You are not in the Admins group.

📋 *CRM Operations*

👤 Contacts
📋 Groups
💬 Messages
🔄 Flows
⚙️ System
❌ Exit

⏱️ CRM session timed out.

Type *ops menu* to start again.

✅ CRM session ended.

Type *ops menu* to start again.

👤 *Contacts*

🔍 Lookup — find a contact
➕ Create — add new contact
🚫 Block — block a contact
🔓 Unblock
⬅️ Back

🚫 *Block Contact*

Enter the contact UUID to block:

⚠️ *This will block contact @results.block_target.value*

Type *CONFIRM* to proceed or anything else to cancel.
🔓 Enter the contact UUID to unblock:

📋 *Groups*

📃 List — show all groups
➕ Create — new group
🗑️ Delete — remove group
⬅️ Back
➕ Enter a name for the new group:
🗑️ Enter the UUID of the group to delete:

⚠️ *This will permanently delete group @results.delete_group_uuid.value*

Type *CONFIRM* to proceed or anything else to cancel.

💬 *Messages*

✉️ Send — message one contact
📢 Broadcast — message a group
⬅️ Back
📢 Enter the group UUID to broadcast to:

🔄 *Flows*

📃 List — show all flows
▶️ Start — start a flow for a contact
⬅️ Back
▶️ Enter the flow UUID to start:

⚙️ *System*

🏢 Org — workspace info
📡 Channels
🌐 Globals — list
✏️ Update Global
📊 Fields — list contact fields
⬅️ Back
✏️ Enter the global key to update:
